# SQLite Amalgamation

This directory contains the official SQLite amalgamation source used by the
quality-control local store.

- Version: 3.53.2
- Package: `sqlite-amalgamation-3530200.zip`
- Source: https://www.sqlite.org/

Only `sqlite3.c`, `sqlite3.h`, and `sqlite3ext.h` are kept. The SQLite command
line shell source is intentionally omitted.
